title: claytonia perfoliata var. spathulata
intro: Claytonia perfoliata var. spathulata, also known as Miner's lettuce or Western spring beauty, is a perennial plant belonging to the Portulacaceae family. It is a natural source of minerals, vitamins, and antioxidants, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Claytonia perfoliata var. spathulata include supporting bone health, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural diuretic, making it a valuable herb for those with kidney stones or urinary issues. Claytonia perfoliata var. spathulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine for its nutritional and medicinal properties.
